# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
metadata:
  description: "ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running web application - Phase 1 deployment"

parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp-vm"
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Virtual Machine"
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_D2s_v3"
    allowedValues:
      - "Standard_D2s_v3"
      - "Standard_D4s_v3"
      - "Standard_D8s_v3"
    metadata:
      description: "Size of the Virtual Machine"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Admin username for the VM"
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "Admin password for the VM"
    minLength: 12
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: "Location for all resources"
  instanceCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 5
    metadata:
      description: "Number of VM instances for the web application"
  osDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 128
    metadata:
      description: "OS disk size in GB"
  dataDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 256
    metadata:
      description: "Data disk size in GB"
  virtualNetworkName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp-vnet"
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Virtual Network"
  subnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp-subnet"
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the subnet"
  networkSecurityGroupName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp-nsg"
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Network Security Group"
  ubuntuOSVersion:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "22_04-lts-gen2"
    allowedValues:
      - "20_04-lts-gen2"
      - "22_04-lts-gen2"
    metadata:
      description: "Ubuntu OS version for the VM"
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "production"
    allowedValues:
      - "development"
      - "staging"
      - "production"
    metadata:
      description: "Environment tag for resources"

variables:
  vnetAddressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnetAddressPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
  diskEncryptionSetName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-des')]"
  keyVaultName: "[concat('kv-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  keyName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-disk-key')]"
  availabilitySetName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-avset')]"
  loadBalancerName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-lb')]"
  loadBalancerFrontendName: "webapp-frontend"
  loadBalancerBackendPoolName: "webapp-backend-pool"
  loadBalancerProbeName: "webapp-health-probe"
  publicIPName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-lb-pip')]"
  tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"

resources:
  # Key Vault for disk encryption keys
  - type: "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults"
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[variables('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
      phase: "1-with-security"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[variables('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: "A"
        name: "premium"
      enabledForDiskEncryption: true
      enabledForDeployment: true
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: true
      enablePurgeProtection: true
      enableSoftDelete: true
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: 90
      enableRbacAuthorization: true
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: "Deny"
        bypass: "AzureServices"

  # Key Vault Key for disk encryption
  - type: "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys"
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('keyVaultName'), '/', variables('keyName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      kty: "RSA"
      keySize: 4096
      keyOps:
        - "encrypt"
        - "decrypt"
        - "wrapKey"
        - "unwrapKey"
      attributes:
        enabled: true

  # Disk Encryption Set
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/diskEncryptionSets"
    apiVersion: "2023-10-02"
    name: "[variables('diskEncryptionSetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys', variables('keyVaultName'), variables('keyName'))]"
    identity:
      type: "SystemAssigned"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      activeKey:
        sourceVault:
          id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]"
        keyUrl: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys', variables('keyVaultName'), variables('keyName')), '2023-07-01', 'Full').properties.keyUriWithVersion]"
      encryptionType: "EncryptionAtRestWithCustomerKey"
      rotationToLatestKeyVersionEnabled: true

  # Network Security Group with restrictive rules
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[parameters('networkSecurityGroupName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "Internet"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "VirtualNetwork"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
        - name: "Allow-HTTP-Inbound-Redirect"
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "Internet"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "VirtualNetwork"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
        - name: "Allow-LB-HealthProbe"
          properties:
            priority: 120
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "AzureLoadBalancer"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "VirtualNetwork"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
        - name: "Deny-All-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Deny"
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"

  # Virtual Network
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[parameters('virtualNetworkName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"

  # Public IP for Load Balancer
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('publicIPName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Static"
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"

  # Load Balancer
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('loadBalancerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('publicIPName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      frontendIPConfigurations:
        - name: "[variables('loadBalancerFrontendName')]"
          properties:
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('publicIPName'))]"
      backendAddressPools:
        - name: "[variables('loadBalancerBackendPoolName')]"
      probes:
        - name: "[variables('loadBalancerProbeName')]"
          properties:
            protocol: "Https"
            port: 443
            requestPath: "/health"
            intervalInSeconds: 15
            numberOfProbes: 2
      loadBalancingRules:
        - name: "HTTPS-Rule"
          properties:
            frontendIPConfiguration:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/frontendIPConfigurations', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('loadBalancerFrontendName'))]"
            backendAddressPool:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('loadBalancerBackendPoolName'))]"
            probe:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/probes', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('loadBalancerProbeName'))]"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            frontendPort: 443
            backendPort: 443
            enableFloatingIP: false
            idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4

  # Availability Set
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('availabilitySetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Aligned"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      platformFaultDomainCount: 2
      platformUpdateDomainCount: 5

  # Network Interfaces (one per VM instance)
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    copy:
      name: "nicLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('virtualNetworkName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('loadBalancerName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
            loadBalancerBackendAddressPools:
              - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('loadBalancerBackendPoolName'))]"

  # Managed OS Disks with encryption (created implicitly with VMs but data disks are explicit)
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/disks"
    apiVersion: "2023-10-02"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-datadisk-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    copy:
      name: "dataDiskLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/diskEncryptionSets', variables('diskEncryptionSetName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "Premium_LRS"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
    properties:
      creationData:
        createOption: "Empty"
      diskSizeGB: "[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]"
      encryption:
        diskEncryptionSetId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/diskEncryptionSets', variables('diskEncryptionSetName'))]"
        type: "EncryptionAtRestWithCustomerKey"
      networkAccessPolicy: "DenyAll"
      publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"

  # Virtual Machines
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    copy:
      name: "vmLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "nicLoop"
      - "dataDiskLoop"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/diskEncryptionSets', variables('diskEncryptionSetName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      application: "webapp"
      patchSchedule: "weekly"
    properties:
      availabilitySet:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: false
          patchSettings:
            patchMode: "AutomaticByPlatform"
            automaticByPlatformSettings:
              rebootSetting: "IfRequired"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "Canonical"
          offer: "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
          sku: "[parameters('ubuntuOSVersion')]"
          version: "latest"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-osdisk-', copyIndex(1))]"
          createOption: "FromImage"
          caching: "ReadWrite"
          diskSizeGB: "[parameters('osDiskSizeGB')]"
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: "Premium_LRS"
            diskEncryptionSet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/diskEncryptionSets', variables('diskEncryptionSetName'))]"
          deleteOption: "Delete"
        dataDisks:
          - lun: 0
            name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-datadisk-', copyIndex(1))]"
            createOption: "Attach"
            caching: "ReadOnly"
            managedDisk:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/disks', concat(parameters('vmName'), '-datadisk-', copyIndex(1)))]"
              storageAccountType: "Premium_LRS"
            deleteOption: "Detach"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmName'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1)))]"
            properties:
              primary: true
              deleteOption: "Delete"
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
      securityProfile:
        securityType: "TrustedLaunch"
        uefiSettings:
          secureBootEnabled: true
          vTpmEnabled: true

outputs:
  loadBalancerPublicIP:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('publicIPName'))).ipAddress]"
  loadBalancerFQDN:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('publicIPName'))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
  vmNames:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      input: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-', copyIndex(1))]"
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('keyVaultName')]"
  diskEncryptionSetName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('diskEncryptionSetName')]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "All disks are encrypted with customer-managed keys via Disk Encryption Set. Trusted Launch is enabled with Secure Boot and vTPM. NSG restricts inbound to HTTPS/HTTP only. No public IPs on VMs - access via Load Balancer only. Ensure Key Vault RBAC role assignments are configured for the Disk Encryption Set managed identity."
